title: soliva minuta
intro: Soliva minuta, also known as mouse ear or lesser hawk's beard, is a small annual plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Soliva minuta include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Soliva minuta include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
